stages.name: Stage 1
stages.description: Early vampirism — modest attribute bonuses with growing weaknesses to fire and sunlight.
stages.bonus: Health, magicka, and stamina increase by 50. Frost resistance +25%. Sneak +15%. Melee damage +5%. Fire resistance -75%.
bonusDetails: Take 2× damage from silver and holy weapons.
Deity shrine and follower effects reduced by 75%.
Normal healing spells and potions do not affect vampires.
Cannot take the Silent Dovah trait.

stages.name: Stage 2
stages.description: Hungry vampire — stronger bonuses and waterbreathing, with harsher fire weakness.
stages.bonus: Health, magicka, and stamina increase by 75. Waterbreathing. Frost resistance +40%. Sneak +20%. Melee damage +10%. Fire resistance -85%.
bonusDetails: Take 2× damage from silver and holy weapons.
Deity shrine and follower effects reduced by 65%.
Normal healing spells and potions do not affect vampires.
Cannot take the Silent Dovah trait.

stages.name: Stage 3
stages.description: Starving vampire — powerful resistances and combat bonuses with severe fire vulnerability.
stages.bonus: Health, magicka, and stamina increase by 100. Poison and disease resistance +100%. Frost resistance +60%. Sneak +25%. Melee damage +15%. Fire resistance -100%.
bonusDetails: Take 2× damage from silver and holy weapons.
Deity shrine and follower effects reduced by 55%.
Normal healing spells and potions do not affect vampires.
Aedric Presence debuff when inside temples.
Cannot take the Silent Dovah trait.

stages.name: Stage 4
stages.description: Fully realized vampire — peak power with devastating fire weakness.
stages.bonus: Health and stamina +100, magicka +125. Movement speed +10%. Armor rating +100. Unarmed damage +30. Frost resistance +50%. Sneak +30%. Melee damage +20%. Fire resistance -150%.
bonusDetails: Take 2× damage from silver and holy weapons.
Deity shrine and follower effects reduced by 45%.
Normal healing spells and potions do not affect vampires.
Aedric Presence debuff when inside temples.
Cannot take the Silent Dovah trait.

argonian.name: Aquatic Predator
argonian.description: Your Argonian blood allows you to sate your Vampiric hunger by catching docile fish.

breton.name: Dolmen Haunt
breton.description: Your Breton heritage allows you to sate your Vampiric hunger by activating a Standing Stone, once a day.

dunmer.name: Promiscuous
dunmer.description: Your Dark Elven blood copies the racial Vampire ability of the race you prey on. You can have only one at a time.

altmer.name: Pale Gold
altmer.description: Your High Elven blood slows Vampiric hunger by 100% and you gain Vampiric ranks 30% faster, if you are Sated.

imperial.name: Connoisseur
imperial.description: Your Imperial sophistication enables you to bottle a Potion of Blood when you Drain a victim.

khajiit.name: Prey Drive
khajiit.description: Your Khajiit fangs enable you to sate your Vampiric hunger by using or consuming Human Flesh or Human Hearts.

nord.name: Preserved Blood
nord.description: Your Nord heritage grants 10% to bottle a Potion of Blood when looting people you killed.

orsimer.name: Battle Hunger
orsimer.description: Your Orc strength enables you to Feed or Drain in combat by activating an enemy person who is bleeding out.

redguard.name: Mummified Body
redguard.description: Your Redguard blood slows Vampiric hunger by 50% and you gain Vampiric ranks 15% faster.

bosmer.name: Blood Hunt
bosmer.description: Your Wood Elven heritage grants 10% to bottle a Potion of Blood when looting animals you killed.

forms.name: Werewolf
forms.description: Curse of the werewolf — enhanced physical power, disease immunity, and beast-form perks with silver vulnerability.
forms.bonus: Your beast blood bestows upon you an immunity to diseases.
bonusDetails: Immune to all diseases (1000% disease resistance).
Take 2× damage from silver and holy weapons.
Cannot take the Silent Dovah trait.
Lycanthropic Speed: movement speed +10% in and out of beast form.
Lycanthropic Regen: regenerate health and stamina in and out of beast form.
Call of the Blood: at night, chance to be forced into beast form based on moon phase.

altmer.name: Golden Mane
altmer.description: Your High Elven blood grants 15% bonus magic resistance in beast form.

argonian.name: Rabies
argonian.description: Your Argonian blood adds poison damage based on level to your attacks in beast form.

bosmer.name: Moonchaser
bosmer.description: Your Wood Elven blood grants 10% extra movement speed in beast form.

breton.name: Skinwalker
breton.description: Your Breton blood reduces the cooldown of Beast Form by 50%.

dunmer.name: Raging Hatred
dunmer.description: Your Dark Elven blood extends the duration of Beast Form by 60 seconds.

imperial.name: Pack Leader
imperial.description: Your Imperial blood reduces the cooldown of howls in beast form by 50%.

khajiit.name: Hunting Instinct
khajiit.description: Your Khajiit blood reduces the Stamina cost of power attacks in beast form by 20%.

nord.name: Vargr
nord.description: Your Nord blood grants 20% bonus attack damage for 30 seconds after feeding in beast form.

orsimer.name: Primal Rage
orsimer.description: Your Orc blood halves attack damage taken for 15 seconds upon activating Beast Form.

redguard.name: Strong Stomach
redguard.description: Your Redguard blood restores 100 points of Stamina when you feed in beast form.

forms.name: Lich
forms.description: Curse of lichdom — undead immortality and magicka mastery with fire weakness and lost mortal healing. Deposit up to 50 souls into your phylactery for stacking power.
forms.bonus: As a lich, health does not regenerate passively and conventional healing spells do not work on you. Healing potions and consumed food have no effect, while other potions have 50% reduced efficacy and duration.
bonusDetails: Immune to disease and poison.
No passive health regeneration.
Conventional healing spells and potions do not heal you — use Necrotic Rejuvenation and other undead healing.
Take 2× damage from silver and holy weapons.
Improved Physical Form: 15% resistance to non-silver melee and 33% resistance to arrows (upgrades at 10 souls).
Resurrect at your phylactery when you die.
Cannot take the Silent Dovah trait.

thresholds.name: Magicka Flood
thresholds.description: Gain 50 magicka. For each soul fed to your phylactery, gain an additional 4 magicka. Spells in lich form last 0.5% longer for each soul fed.
bonusDetails: Base +50 magicka from Magicka Flood.
+4 magicka per soul in the phylactery.
+0.5% spell duration in lich form per soul.

thresholds.name: Lich Barrier
thresholds.description: For each soul fed to your phylactery, gain 2 armor rating and 0.5% spell absorption, with an additional 0.5% in lich form.
bonusDetails: +2 armor rating per soul.
+0.5% spell absorption per soul.
+0.5% spell absorption in lich form per soul.

thresholds.name: Bane of Life
thresholds.description: As your necromantic abilities grow, you learn to manipulate the energy of living souls into raw magicka. You may now cast Bane of Life.

thresholds.name: Necromantic Affinity
thresholds.description: Your affinity for necromancy grows. Necrotic Rejuvenation, Bane of Life, and Death Grip are 50 percent more effective.
bonusDetails: Necrotic Rejuvenation, Bane of Life, and Death Grip are 50% more effective.

thresholds.name: Phylactery Conduit
thresholds.description: Use your staff as a conduit for the potent magic that surges through your phylactery. In lich form, while wielding a staff, all spells last 10 percent longer, while magicka regenerates 1 percent faster for each soul in your phylactery.
bonusDetails: In lich form while wielding a staff: spells last 10% longer.
In lich form while wielding a staff: magicka regenerates 1% faster per soul in your phylactery.

thresholds.name: Improved Physical Form
thresholds.description: You learn to construct a stronger physical form for yourself, gaining higher resistance to ordinary weapons. You are now 25 percent resistant to non-silver melee weapons and 50 percent resistant to ranged weapons.
bonusDetails: 25% resistance to non-silver melee weapons.
50% resistance to ranged weapons.

thresholds.name: Mighty Lich Form
thresholds.description: Your lich form is mightier than ever. Augmented by the souls stored in your phylactery, it is faster, stronger, and more durable than before.

thresholds.name: Tempered Form
thresholds.description: Even the the innate disadvantages of unlife can be overcome with the right magic. You construct a physical form that is 50 percent less weak to fire than before.
bonusDetails: Fire weakness reduced by half (base -100% fire resistance becomes -50%).

thresholds.name: Apocryphal Clarity
thresholds.description: Untethered from the mortal shell, you see behind the veil of the world and perceive the nature of reality with newfound clarity. Gazing into strange Apocrypha, you learn esoteric secrets buried within its labyrinthine libraries. The unknowable becomes known. Experience gain from Transcendence is 5 percent faster, and reading skill books grants you an extra skill point.
bonusDetails: Transcendence experience gain is 5% faster.
Reading skill books grants an extra skill point.

thresholds.name: Mind Flay
thresholds.description: You learn to temporarily disrupt the minds of living beings, preventing them from accessing magic. You may now cast Mind Flay.

thresholds.name: Enslave Mind
thresholds.description: You learn to dominate the wills of living targets, temporarily putting them under your control. You may now cast Enslave Mind.

thresholds.name: Veil of Deceit
thresholds.description: As the stench of death grows on you, you shroud yourself in an unbreaking magical aura, permanently concealing the true nature of your ghastly appearance. All eyes are deceived by the illusion - your lich form is no longer hated and feared, and will not be attacked on sight.
bonusDetails: Lich form is no longer attacked on sight.

thresholds.name: Enslave Undead
thresholds.description: While the light of human experience dims, your affinity towards the unliving strengthens. Your arcane might overpowers the wills of all undead creatures. You may now cast Enslave Undead.

thresholds.name: Mannimarco's Favor
thresholds.description: An unholy presence creeps on you, a sense of being seen by the leering eyes of a god that should not be. The King Of Worm watches over you. When Mannimarco's Moon passes over Nirn, offer at his altar a filled black soul gem to create a scroll of Mannimarco's Will. Cast the scroll to raise your summon limit by 1 for 2 hours. Scrolls may stack up to 12 times.
bonusDetails: Offer a filled black soul gem at Mannimarco's altar during Mannimarco's Moon to create a scroll of Mannimarco's Will.
Scroll raises summon limit by 1 for 2 hours; stacks up to 12 times.

thresholds.name: Mass Reanimate
thresholds.description: Reanimating a corpse is an arduous task - for a mortal. As a lich, the dark practice is second nature. Your boundless magicka and profane knowledge allows you to raise armies of the dead at will. You may now cast Mass Reanimate, resurrecting all dead targets in the area to fight for you.

thresholds.name: Call Dracolich
thresholds.description: You may call forth a dracolich from Oblivion to fight for you.

thresholds.name: Devour Soul
thresholds.description: You have become a master over life and death, and the forces that demarcate the two. The souls of living beings can be torn out at a lift of a finger. You may now cast Devour Soul.
